Hi! I’m Janet and i’m here to help you discover all the benefits of essential oils. If you have any questions about essential oils for you or your family, I’m always happy to chat on the phone, or receive your email…

How to Use Essential Oils For Living Healthy

Soothe Body & Soul

Discover how to use essential oils to transform your health and well-being with natural safe alternatives.

Relax Your Mind

Using essential oils in aromatherapy may assist with creating an invigorating or calming environment.

Healthy Cooking

Create delicious tasting meals or snacks with therapeutic benefits using quality essential oils.

Why Use dōTERRA Essential Oils?

Ingredients That Come From Nature

Essential Oils come from nature, extracted from for their soothing and healing qualities, without harmful chemicals or toxins.

Certified Pure Therapeutic Grade®

Protocol developed to ensure that each bottle of essential oil is pure and free from contaminants or synthetic fillers.

dōTERRA Guided Info Session

Knowing How to Use Essential Oils means understand the benefits each essential oil or blend. Sometimes knowing what to oil choose or what oil will be best for your situation can be confusing. What we usually do is set up a 30 minute conversation to talk about your health goals and issues, review the most popular oils and discuss ways your family can use them. This is a No Obligation Guided Information Session.

  • Free 30 minute Consultation
  • Personalised Essential Oil Information
  • Choose Your Essential Oils With Help
  • Additional Information About DoTerra
